name: best-practices
description: Community-aware Claude Code. Before answering, checks whether the community has a mature solution for your scenario. Four honest tiers: ✅ Found (direct best practice) / 🔧 Synthesized (same-scenario fragments) / 🧩 Adapted (adapted from adjacent scenarios with similar constraints) / 💡 Deduced (first-principles, last resort). Works for any domain — technical, product, life skills.
